name: CXyz Skypalace Babylon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＣＸ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオスエクシーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>中</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>要</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バビロン
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Ekushīzu Chōkyodai Kūchū Yōsai Babiron
desc:
3 Level 11 monsters
When this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to half the original ATK of the destroyed monster in the Graveyard. If this card has "Skypalace Gangaridai" as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn, if this card destroys a monster by battle: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; it can make a second attack in a row.
mnst_eff:

● Once per turn, if this card destroys a monster by battle: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; it can make a second attack in a row.
